---
agent: speckit.specify
---

Create a feature specification for the requested capability.

Use the project context and any existing constitution in `.specify/memory/constitution.md`.

The output should include:
- a concise feature name,
- user stories and acceptance scenarios,
- functional requirements,
- edge cases,
- assumptions,
- success criteria,
- and any important open questions marked as NEEDS CLARIFICATION when necessary.

Write the result into the feature spec file under `specs/`.
